narrative:
Loramie Township has 1,744 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.6 percentage points.
